rationale: The citing paper explicitly says it extends prior work on differential returns to marketing actions across brands, and the cited paper’s core contribution is exactly that firm resources moderate returns to deployment actions (distribution/coupons). Both studies use brand-level CPG scanner settings and resource-based moderators, making the cited work a plausible theoretical/methodological foundation rather than a generic mention. Despite only one DOI match and no quote context, the conceptual alignment is strong enough to warrant full relation judgment.
